heading: Expansion of effective food, nutrition, and consumer education services
label: 3175b Expansion of effective food, nutrition, and consumer education services

CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Food Security Act of 1985, and not as part of the National Agricultural Research, Extension, and Teaching Policy Act of 1977 which comprises this chapter.

children.text: increase their ability to manage their food budgets, including food stamps and other food assistance;
increase their ability to buy food that satisfies nutritional needs and promotes good health; and
improve their food preparation, storage, safety, preservation, and sanitation practices.
